overview: A GPS-based smart garbage truck management system with three role-based views — Owner, Driver, and Public — in a single unified app. Owners monitor vehicle fleets and driver status. Drivers activate GPS, report waste fill levels, and communicate with owners and customers. Customers request pickups, track trucks live, and access helpline numbers.
features: Role-based login for Owner, Driver, and Public users
Owner dashboard with vehicle fleet, driver profiles, and on-duty status
Driver portal with GPS toggle, waste fill percentage reporting, and duty status
Public view with live GPS truck tracking, garbage pickup requests, and complaint form
In-app messaging between all roles with unread indicators
Click-to-call for drivers, helpline, and women's helpline numbers
Smart Pay tip UI with PhonePe, GPay, Paytm, and Post Office Savings Account links
Automatic thank-you message after tip submission
Driver profile with name, age, phone, blood group, address, and photo
